name: vercel
description: Vercel deployments and project configuration. Use for any project deployed to Vercel — preview deployments, production releases, env-var management.

tools.name: vercel_list_projects
tools.description: List all Vercel projects in the team.

tools.name: vercel_list_deployments
tools.description: List recent deployments for a project. Returns status, branch, commit, and URL.

tools.name: vercel_get_deployment_logs
tools.description: Fetch build and runtime logs for a deployment. Used by the validator to diagnose build failures.

tools.name: vercel_promote_to_production
tools.description: Promote a preview deployment to production. The hook layer requires a separate .forge/vercel-prod-approved file before this runs.

tools.name: vercel_set_env
tools.description: Set an environment variable on a project. Sensitive values (containing SECRET/TOKEN/KEY in the name) require the user to provide the value directly — never write secrets from the model.

envVars.name: VERCEL_TOKEN
envVars.description: Vercel API token from vercel.com/dashboard → Settings → Tokens.

envVars.name: VERCEL_TEAM_ID
envVars.description: Team ID if the project is in a team. Optional for personal accounts.
